calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-29-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 9:15am
Judge Pro Tem David Flesig, clerk J. Kong, D525, not reported.
Cause Called for Small Claims appeal. Respondent, no appearence by any parties; Appellant, The Salvation Army appears by counsel Christopher F. Tuttle. Parites previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Fleisig.

Appellant's Counsel informed Judge that the parties have settled out of Court. Judge make a ruling on the bench that the appeal will be dismissed and for the counsel to filed necessary documents with the Small Claims Department for Small Claims judgment.

9:20am
Matter is submitted. No evidence submitted.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-28-2014 Continued To May-29-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-05-2014 Judgment Entered
